CustomDataType.description: Represents OCPP CustomData. Allows vendor-specific extension properties.

LogStatusEnumType.description: This field indicates whether the Charging Station was able to accept the request.

StatusInfoType.description: Element providing more information about the status.

reasonCode.description: A predefined code for the reason why the status is returned in this response. The string is case-insensitive.

additionalInfo.description: Additional text to provide detailed information.

filename.description: This contains the name of the log file that will be uploaded. This field is not present when no logging information is available.
